root.sql:
select PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as membername, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id
,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date) as resignation_approve_date_tdate
,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ) as receipt_date_tdate ,sc_com_m_receipt.share_stock ,sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc ,('!op_date_1!')::timestamp as begin_date ,('!op_date_2!')::timestamp as end_date from sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group
, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type , sc_com_m_receipt ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type where ( sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type ) and sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' and sc_com_m_receipt.share_stock = sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date between ('!op_date_1!')::timestamp and ('!op_date_2!')::timestamp /*WHERE*/

r_tnma_labour_share_withdraw_zero_nest_a.sql: SELECT sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no, sc_com_m_receipt_item.seq_no, sc_com_m_receipt_item.description, sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.balance FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) )
